creator: maho@FreeBSD.org
text:
ports/net-im/papyon (py26-papyon-0.5.4) gets Signal 11 at configure stage.

===>   py26-papyon-0.5.4 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/python2.6/site-packages/OpenSSL/SSL.so - found
===>   py26-papyon-0.5.4 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/python2.6/site-packages/Crypto/Hash/SHA.py - found
===>   py26-papyon-0.5.4 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/gstreamer-0.10/libgstpython.so - found
===>   py26-papyon-0.5.4 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/python2.6/site-packages/farsight.so - found
===>   py26-papyon-0.5.4 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/python2.6 - found
===>  Configuring for py26-papyon-0.5.4
*** Signal 11

Stop in /work/cvsup/ports/net-im/papyon.

same on i386 and amd64.

Fix: 

sorry this is what i want ;-)
How-To-Repeat: described above.
